description: Senior finance manager — numerical reasoning + leadership, on-site proctoring OK
persona: Head of HR at a bank hiring a Finance Manager (VP level). Needs strong numerical reasoning and leadership/personality profile. On-site assessment centre context; proctoring mode is flexible. Duration up to 90 minutes.

turns.content: I'm looking to assess a Finance Manager candidate — VP level at a bank.

For a senior finance role I'd typically look at numerical reasoning, a personality profile, and possibly a leadership/management style questionnaire. Any constraints on test duration or delivery format?
Up to 90 minutes is fine. It's an assessment centre so proctoring isn't a concern.
Here is a recommended battery for a VP Finance candidate at an assessment centre...
